properties.name: resource-pressure.fluctuation-range
properties.description: Allowed fluctuation range such as 10% or ±10%.

properties.name: resource-pressure.max-heap-allocation-ratio
properties.description: Maximum ratio of JVM heap this starter may retain.

properties.name: resource-pressure.memory-chunk-bytes
properties.description: Memory pressure allocation chunk size in bytes.

properties.name: resource-pressure.utilization
properties.description: Target CPU and memory usage profiles by concurrency.
